description: Perform a torque ripple analysis on a vertical axis wind turbine (VAWT) using QBlade. The analysis requires generating a NACA 0021 airfoil (100 panels) with an XFoil polar analysis (Re=300,000, NCrit=9) extrapolated to 360 degrees. Design a 3-bladed H-Rotor VAWT (Radius=2m, Blade Height=3m, Chord=0.25m) and run a Double Multiple Streamtube (DMS) simulation at a Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of 2.5 and wind speed of 10 m/s. Calculate the Torque Ripple Factor (TRF) defined as (Q_max - Q_min) / Q_avg. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/vawt_ripple.wpa and document Q_max, Q_min, Q_avg, and the Ripple Factor in a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/ripple_report.txt.
